country_result:
Country: Germany
Coordinates: 51.1657, 11.4039
Reasoning: Multiple agents identified the landscape, architecture, and road infrastructure as highly characteristic of Germany. Specifically, the Meta and Regulatory agents highlighted the "Leitplanke" guardrail profile, the "Frankfurter Pfanne" style red-tiled roofs, and the specific mounting of the blue road sign on a circular galvanized steel post as strong indicators of German (StVO) standards. While Austria shares similar traits, the combination of the farm building construction and the specific road infrastructure details points more strongly to the German Mittelgebirge regions.
